pad1.name: `var 'HCpage' ? cue_display 5 : cue_display 1`
pad1.tooltip: Click to assign or trigger Hotcue\nRight-click to Delete

pad2.name: `var 'HCpage' ? cue_display 6 : cue_display 2`
pad2.tooltip: Click to assign or trigger Hotcue\nRight-click to Delete

pad3.name: `var 'HCpage' ? cue_display 7 : cue_display 3`
pad3.tooltip: Click to assign or trigger Hotcue\nRight-click to Delete

pad4.name: `var 'HCpage' ? cue_display 8 : cue_display 4`
pad4.tooltip: Click to assign or trigger Hotcue\nRight-click to Delete

pad5.name: `var 'LOPage' ? saved_loop 5 ? get_saved_loop 5 'pos' : get_text "5 ./." : saved_loop 1 ? get_saved_loop 1 'pos' : get_text "1 ./."`

page.pad5: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 5 : loop_load 5 ? loop_load_prepare 5 : loop_save 5 : holding ? loop_delete 1 : loop_load 1 ? loop_load_prepare 1 : loop_save 1

pad6.name: `var 'LOPage' ? saved_loop 6 ? get_saved_loop 6 'pos' : get_text "6 ./." : saved_loop 2 ? get_saved_loop 2 'pos' : get_text "2 ./."`

page.pad6: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 6 : loop_load 6 ? loop_load_prepare 6 : loop_save 6 : holding ? loop_delete 2 : loop_load 2 ? loop_load_prepare 2 : loop_save 2

pad7.name: `var 'LOPage' ? saved_loop 7 ? get_saved_loop 7 'pos' : get_text "7 ./." : saved_loop 3 ? get_saved_loop 3 'pos' : get_text "3 ./."`

page.pad7: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 7 : loop_load 7 ? loop_load_prepare 7 : loop_save 7 : holding ? loop_delete 3 : loop_load 3 ? loop_load_prepare 3 : loop_save 3

pad8.name: `var 'LOPage' ? saved_loop 8 ? get_saved_loop 8 'pos' : get_text "8 ./." : saved_loop 4 ? get_saved_loop 4 'pos' : get_text "4 ./."`

page.pad8: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 8 : loop_load 8 ? loop_load_prepare 8 : loop_save 8 : holding ? loop_delete 4 : loop_load 4 ? loop_load_prepare 4 : loop_save 4

shift_pad1.name: DELETE
shift_pad1.color: var 'HCPage' ? has_cue 5 ? color 'white' : color 'transparent' : has_cue 1 ? color 'white'

page.shift_pad1: var 'HCPage' ? holding ? delete_cue 5 : cue_name 5 : holding ? delete_cue 1 : cue_name 1

shift_pad2.name: DELETE
shift_pad2.color: var 'HCPage' ? has_cue 6 ? color 'white' : color 'transparent' : has_cue 2 ? color 'white'

page.shift_pad2: var 'HCPage' ? holding ? delete_cue 6 : cue_name 6 : holding ? delete_cue 2 : cue_name 2

shift_pad3.name: DELETE
shift_pad3.color: var 'HCPage' ? has_cue 7 ? color 'white' : color 'transparent' : has_cue 3 ? color 'white'

page.shift_pad3: var 'HCPage' ? holding ? delete_cue 7 : cue_name 7 : holding ? delete_cue 3 : cue_name 3

shift_pad4.name: DELETE
shift_pad4.color: var 'HCPage' ? has_cue 8 ? color 'white' : color 'transparent' : has_cue 4 ? color 'white'

page.shift_pad4: var 'HCPage' ? holding ? delete_cue 8 : cue_name 8 : holding ? delete_cue 4 : cue_name 4
page.shift_pad5: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 5 : nothing : holding ? loop_delete 1 : nothing
page.shift_pad6: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 6 : nothing : holding ? loop_delete 2 : nothing
page.shift_pad7: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 7 : nothing : holding ? loop_delete 3 : nothing
page.shift_pad8: var 'LOPage' ? holding ? loop_delete 8 : nothing : holding ? loop_delete 4 : nothing
page.menu:
Display CUE mode >> Cue number +[cue_display 'number'] Display CUE mode >> Name +[cue_display 'name'] Display CUE mode >> Time Pos +[cue_display 'position'] Display CUE mode >> Time left +[cue_display 'distance'] Display CUE mode >> Beats left +[cue_display 'beat']
Edit CUEs and POIs... =[edit_poi] Read-only (Lock) +[lock_cues] Smart Cue +[smart_cue] Quantize on Set +[quantize_setcue] - Loop Mode >> On/Off +[loop_pad_mode 1] Loop Mode >> Hold +[loop_pad_mode 2] Loop Mode >> Roll +[loop_pad_mode 3] Quantize Loop +[quantize_loop]
